title: vicia unguiculata subsp. atropurpurea
intro: Vicia unguiculata subsp. atropurpurea, commonly known as purple vetch or purple hairy vetch, is a subspecies of the annual legume plant Vicia unguiculata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Vicia unguiculata subsp. atropurpurea include its ability to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins. In herbal preparations, Vicia unguiculata subsp. atropurpurea is typically used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
